'''Thokos''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Thokos system/Legends|Thokos system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. [[Colonist/Legends|Colonists]] from Thokos settled [[Ammuud/Legends|Ammuud]].<ref name="HSCSS">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref> Thokos has been settled over 25 [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] ago.<ref name="BHCFFBF">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
